title: coelogyne hastata
intro: Coelogyne hastata, also known as the 'spur orchid', is a species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Coelogyne hastata include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are taken to harness its medicinal properties.
